summary: The user is preparing for an upcoming charity cycling event and seeks advice on training and fundraising strategies. They recently participated in the "Ride for a Reason" event on March 25th and are interested in improving their social media fundraising skills, including crafting compelling posts and expressing gratitude to donors. The session also covers creating a donor recognition page and forming a fundraising team.
facts: The user participated in the "Ride for a Reason" charity cycling event on March 25th, which had around 200 participants. The user is planning to participate in another charity cycling event soon. The user is looking to improve their fundraising skills, specifically on social media. The user has had some experience with social media fundraising before. The user is interested in creating a donor recognition page to acknowledge their donors. The user plans to keep the donor recognition page simple, easy to navigate, and up-to-date. The user will obtain permission from donors before listing their names and amounts on the recognition page. The user is interested in creating a fundraising team to amplify their fundraising efforts.
